name: IdsDmMbrshDmSubIdHistExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT DISTINCT SUB_ID_HIST.SUB_SK, SUB_ID_HIST.IDS_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK, COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, SUB_ID_HIST.SUB_UNIQ_KEY, SUB_ID_HIST.GRP_SK, SUB_ID_HIST.IDS_CUR_RCRD_IN, SUB_ID_HIST.SCRD_IN, SUB_ID_HIST.IDS_RCRD_END_DT_SK, SUB_ID_HIST.GRP_ID, SUB_ID_HIST.SUB_ID, SUB_ID_HIST.SUB_INDV_BE_KEY FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.SUB_ID_HIST SUB_ID_HIST LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON SUB_ID_HIST.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR MBR WHERE SUB_ID_HIST.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND MBR.SUB_SK = SUB_ID_HIST.SUB_SK AND MBR.HOST_MBR_IN <> 'Y'), cte2 AS (SELECT *, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(SRC_SYS_CD)) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD_fix FROM cte1), cte3 AS (SELECT * FROM cte2 WHERE SUB_SK <> 0 AND SUB_SK <> 1), cte_final AS (SELECT SRC_SYS_CD_fix AS SRC_SYS_CD, SUB_UNIQ_KEY, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(IDS_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK)) IN ('NA','UNK') THEN '1753-01-01 00:00:00.000' ELSE CONVERT(DATETIME2(3), IDS_RCRD_STRT_DT_SK + ' 00:00:00.000', 121) END AS EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT, IDS_CUR_RCRD_IN AS EDW_CUR_RCRD_IN, CASE WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(IDS_RCRD_END_DT_SK)) IN ('NA','UNK') THEN '2199-12-31 00:00:00.000' ELSE CONVERT(DATETIME2(3), IDS_RCRD_END_DT_SK + ' 00:00:00.000', 121) END AS EDW_RCRD_END_DT, GRP_SK, GRP_ID, SUB_SK, SCRD_IN, SUB_INDV_BE_KEY, SUB_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM cte3) SELECT SRC_SYS_CD, SUB_UNIQ_KEY, EDW_RCRD_STRT_DT, EDW_CUR_RCRD_IN, EDW_RCRD_END_DT, GRP_SK, GRP_ID, SUB_SK, SCRD_IN, SUB_INDV_BE_KEY, SUB_ID, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM cte_final

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2006 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:    IdsMbrSubIdHistExtr

DESCRIPTION:  
                   IDS Membership Data Mart Member Subscriber ID History extract from IDS to Data Mart.  

INPUTS:
                   IDS:  SUB_ID_HIST

HASH FILES:         
                    hf_etrnl_cd_mppng

TRANSFORMS:  
                    Lookups to extract fields             
                           
PROCESSING:
                    Extracts from IDS and pulls to the Data Marts.  Perform no changes with the data except for changing UNK and NA dates to 1753-01-01.

OUTPUTS: 
                    Data Mart:  MBRSH_DM_SUB_ID_HIST

MODIFICATIONS:
                   Tao Luo:  Original Programming - 03/29/2006


Developer                          Date                    Project/Altiris #                     Change Description                                                       Development Project               Code Reviewer                      Date Reviewed
---------------------------------      -------------------      -----------------------------------           ---------------------------------------------------------                                 ----------------------------------              ---------------------------------               -------------------------
            
  
Nagesh Bandi                07/29/2013              5114                                 Original Programming(Server to Parallel)                             IntegrateWrhsDevl              Peter Marshall                          10/23/2013


Pooja Sunkara               04/22/2015             TFS#4460                        Added a constraint in Transformer to filter out                     IntegrateNewDevl                  Kalyan Neelam                        2015-04-22                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   NA and UNK rows since we don't use those                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         in datamart tables
Kalyan Neelam               2015-10-29          5212                                Added to the SQL, join to MBR to filter out hosted members     IntegrateDev1                      Bhoomi Dasari                          10/29/2015

Annotations:
Write SUB_ID_HIST Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsDmMbrshDmSubIdHistLoad.
Read all the Data from IDS SUB_ID_HIST Table; Pull records based on LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
IDS Membership Data Mart Member Subscriber ID History extract from IDS to Data Mart.  

Job Name: IdsDmMbrshDmSubIdHistExtr
